USCE-THIRSTY.title: Thirsty
USCE-THIRSTY.description: After playing this card, you must kill a non-Minion enemy before you can play it again.
USCE-SLUGGISH.title: Sluggish
USCE-SLUGGISH.description: Until the end of your turn, this card cannot be discarded.
USCE-GREATBLADE.title: Great Blade
USCE-GREATBLADE.description: This card is also considered a [gold]Shiv[/gold].
USCE-EXTINCT.title: Extinct
USCE-EXTINCT.description: After playing this card, remove it from your [gold]deck[/gold]. This card cannot be copied.
USCE-DRIFTING.title: Drifting
USCE-DRIFTING.description: When you play another card, discard this from your [gold]hand[/gold], then draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
